For detailed publications: Google Scholar

Author order follows the published articles. * denotes equal contribution.

Peer-Reviewed Journal Articles

[16]. “Exploring entropy landscapes using hard particle Monte Carlo metadynamics”
Charlotte Shiqi Zhao*, Sun-Ting Tsai*, and Sharon C. Glotzer
Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. 123, e2537764123 (2026)

Charlotte Shiqi Zhao, Sun-Ting Tsai, and Sharon C. Glotzer
J. Chem. Phys. 164, 024107 (2026)

Shih-Kuang Alex Lee, Sun-Ting Tsai, and Sharon C. Glotzer
J. Chem. Phys. 160, 154106 (2024)

[13]. “Driving and characterizing nucleation of urea and glycine polymorphs in water”
Ziyue Zou, Eric R. Beyerle, Sun-Ting Tsai, and Pratyush Tiwary
Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. 120, e2216099120 (2023)

[12]. “Path sampling of recurrent neural networks by incorporating known physics”
Sun-Ting Tsai, Eric Fields, Yijia Xu, En-Jui Kuo, and Pratyush Tiwary
Nature Communications 13, 7231 (2022)

[11]. “Toward automated sampling of polymorph nucleation and free energies with the SGOOP and metadynamics”
Ziyue Zou, Sun-Ting Tsai, and Pratyush Tiwary
J. Phys. Chem. B 125, 13049-13056 (2021)

Sun-Ting Tsai, Zachary Smith, and Pratyush Tiwary
J. Chem. Theory Comput. 17, 6757-6765 (2021)

[9]. “Learning molecular dynamics with simple language model built upon long short-term memory neural network”
Sun-Ting Tsai, En-Jui Kuo, and Pratyush Tiwary

Sun-Ting Tsai and Pratyush Tiwary
Molecular Simulation, 1-8 (2020)
